nodes.node_description: Configure the order checkout screen — labels, section visibility, delivery date, remarks, and confirmation behaviour

config.label: App Bar Title
config.description: Title shown in the top bar of the checkout screen (e.g. Order Summary)

config.label: Submit Button Label
config.description: Label on the submit button at the bottom of checkout (e.g. SUBMIT, PLACE ORDER)

config.label: Show Delivery Date
config.description: Display the estimated delivery date field on the checkout screen

config.label: Show Order Remarks
config.description: Allow reps to add a free-text remark when placing an order

config.label: Show Confirmation Popup
config.description: Show a confirmation dialog before submitting the order

advanced_config.label: Show Order Summary Section
advanced_config.description: Display the order summary card (totals, quantities, bill value) on checkout

advanced_config.label: Show Tax Summary Section
advanced_config.description: Display a GST/tax breakdown section on the checkout screen

advanced_config.label: Show Product Details Section
advanced_config.description: Display the list of ordered products with quantities and prices on checkout

advanced_config.label: Show Distributor Details Section
advanced_config.description: Display the assigned distributor's information on the checkout screen

advanced_config.label: Show Remarks Section
advanced_config.description: Show the remarks input as a dedicated card on checkout

advanced_config.label: Show Disclaimer Section
advanced_config.description: Display a disclaimer notice at the bottom of the checkout screen

config.label: Order Placed — Title
config.description: Heading on the success screen after order is placed (e.g. ORDER PLACED)

advanced_config.label: Order Placed — Subtitle
advanced_config.description: Subtitle below the heading on the success screen (e.g. SUCCESSFULLY)

advanced_config.label: CTA Button Label
advanced_config.description: Label on the action button after order is placed (e.g. CONTINUE)

advanced_config.label: Enable Feedback
advanced_config.description: Show an issue selection panel after the order is placed

advanced_config.label: Enable Rating
advanced_config.description: Show a star or emoji rating prompt after the order is placed
